vacation is a period of rest and relaxation. * * *  
during a vacation, people often enjoy beaches and parks.  
the purpose of a vacation is to escape daily life.  

vacation is a time for relaxation and enjoyment. * * *  
during a vacation, people can travel and explore new places.  
the main goal of a vacation is to enjoy the experience.  

vacation is a way to unwind and recharge. * * *  
during a vacation, people can spend time with family and friends.  
the key benefit of a vacation is mental and physical relief.
